tldr_zh: Nvidia轉型AI基礎設施，Alphabet募資800億美元，Anthropic申請IPO，AI產業動態頻繁。
tldr_en: Nvidia pivots to AI infrastructure, Alphabet raises $80B, Anthropic files for IPO, marking a dynamic period for the AI industry.

items.title_zh: 黃仁勳：Nvidia全面轉型AI基礎設施公司，引領代理AI時代
items.title_en: Jensen Huang: Nvidia Transforms into AI Infrastructure Company, Leading the Agent AI Era
items.summary_zh: Nvidia執行長黃仁勳宣告AI已從生成式AI邁向智慧代理（代理AI）時代，並宣布Nvidia將全面轉型為AI基礎設施公司。此戰略轉型將推動企業加速建置AI工廠，並發表專為代理AI打造的新平台與工具套件。
items.summary_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang announced that AI is transitioning from generative AI to agent AI, and Nvidia is fully transforming into an AI infrastructure company. This strategic shift aims to accelerate enterprise AI factory deployment and introduces new platforms and toolkits designed for agent AI.

items.title_zh: Alphabet擬募資800億美元，擴建AI基礎設施與運算能力
items.title_en: Alphabet Plans to Raise $80 Billion for AI Infrastructure and Compute Expansion
items.summary_zh: Alphabet宣布計劃募資800億美元股權資本，以大幅擴展其AI基礎設施和運算能力。此舉反映了企業和消費者對其AI解決方案與服務的強勁需求，已超出公司現有供應能力。
items.summary_en: Alphabet announced plans to raise $80 billion in equity capital to significantly expand its AI infrastructure and computing capabilities. This move reflects strong demand for its AI solutions and services from enterprises and consumers, exceeding the company's current supply.

items.title_zh: AI巨頭Anthropic秘密提交IPO申請，估值近兆美元
items.title_en: AI Giant Anthropic Secretly Files for IPO, Valued Near a Trillion Dollars
items.summary_zh: OpenAI的競爭對手Anthropic已秘密向美國證券交易委員會提交首次公開發行（IPO）申請。此前，該公司剛完成一輪募資，使其估值接近兆美元，為AI產業的資本市場帶來重大動態。
items.summary_en: OpenAI competitor Anthropic has confidentially filed for an Initial Public Offering (IPO) with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This follows a recent funding round that valued the company close to a trillion dollars, marking a significant development in the AI industry's capital market.

items.title_zh: 佛羅里達州起訴OpenAI與Sam Altman，指控隱瞞ChatGPT風險
items.title_en: Florida Sues OpenAI and Sam Altman, Alleging Concealment of ChatGPT Risks
items.summary_zh: 佛羅里達州總檢察長對OpenAI及其執行長Sam Altman提起訴訟，指控他們隱瞞ChatGPT的嚴重風險，並聲稱該公司對人類生命「毫無顧忌」。這是一起針對AI模型潛在危害的重大法律挑戰。
items.summary_en: Florida's Attorney General has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, accusing them of concealing serious risks associated with ChatGPT and alleging the company has an "utter disregard" for human lives. This represents a significant legal challenge concerning the potential harms of AI models.

items.title_zh: Meta AI客服聊天機器人遭駭客利用，導致Instagram帳號被劫持
items.title_en: Meta AI Support Chatbot Exploited by Hackers, Leading to Instagram Account Hijacks
items.summary_zh: Meta的AI客服聊天機器人被駭客利用，成功劫持了多個Instagram帳號。駭客透過要求機器人更改與帳號相關聯的電子郵件，然後重設密碼來取得控制權，Meta已表示此問題已修復。
items.summary_en: Meta's AI support chatbot was exploited by hackers to hijack multiple Instagram accounts. Hackers gained control by asking the chatbot to change the email associated with a profile and then resetting the password; Meta has stated the issue has been patched.

items.title_zh: OpenAI前沿模型與Codex現已在AWS上全面推出
items.title_en: OpenAI Frontier Models and Codex Now Generally Available on AWS
items.summary_zh: OpenAI的前沿模型和Codex現在已在AWS上全面推出，為企業提供透過現有AWS環境、控制和採購流程使用OpenAI技術的新途徑。這將加速客戶從評估到生產的過程。
items.summary_en: OpenAI's frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, offering enterprises a new pathway to build with OpenAI through their existing AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows. This move aims to accelerate customers' transition from evaluation to production.

items.title_zh: OpenAI在密西根州啟動1GW資料中心計畫，建構AI基礎設施
items.title_en: OpenAI Breaks Ground on 1GW Data Center Project in Michigan for AI Infrastructure
items.summary_zh: OpenAI在密西根州啟動一項1吉瓦（GW）的資料中心計畫，作為其「星門」（Stargate）專案的一部分。此舉旨在建構強大的AI基礎設施，以擴大AI存取、創造就業機會並支持當地社區發展。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has broken ground on a 1-gigawatt (GW) data center project in Michigan, part of its "Stargate" initiative. This aims to build robust AI infrastructure to expand AI access, create jobs, and support local communities.

items.title_zh: Anthropic發布Claude Opus 4.8，強化代理任務與程式開發
items.title_en: Anthropic Releases Claude Opus 4.8, Enhancing Agent Tasks and Coding
items.summary_zh: AI模型開發商Anthropic發布了其最新模型Claude Opus 4.8，在程式開發、代理式任務、推理和實務知識工作等多項基準測試中表現優於前一代Opus 4.7。這顯示了其在複雜AI應用上的進步。
items.summary_en: AI model developer Anthropic has released its latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, which outperforms its predecessor, Opus 4.7, across various benchmarks including coding, agentic tasks, reasoning, and practical knowledge work. This demonstrates significant advancements in complex AI applications.

items.title_zh: Nvidia RTX Spark晶片將推動Windows Arm筆電，挑戰Apple M1
items.title_en: Nvidia RTX Spark Chips to Power Windows Arm Laptops, Challenging Apple M1
items.summary_zh: Nvidia宣布將推出RTX Spark晶片，進軍消費級筆記型電腦市場，為Windows Arm筆電帶來強大性能。此舉有望成為Windows平台的「M1時刻」，提供媲美Apple M系列晶片的效能與電池續航力。
items.summary_en: Nvidia announced its entry into the consumer laptop chip market with RTX Spark, bringing powerful performance to Windows Arm laptops. This move could be a "Windows' M1 moment," offering performance and battery life comparable to Apple's M-series chips.

items.title_zh: GitHub Copilot改採依用量計費，用戶反映費用激增
items.title_en: GitHub Copilot Shifts to Usage-Based Pricing, Users Report Soaring Costs
items.summary_zh: GitHub Copilot已改為依用量計費的定價模式，導致部分用戶反映其每月「AI點數」額度在一天內即耗盡。此新政策對開發者使用AI輔助工具的成本產生顯著影響。
items.summary_en: GitHub Copilot has transitioned to a usage-based pricing system, with some users reporting that their entire monthly "AI credit" allotment is consumed in a single day. This new policy significantly impacts the cost for developers using AI-powered coding tools.

items.title_zh: 數十個Red Hat套件遭後門植入，透過官方NPM管道散布
items.title_en: Dozens of Red Hat Packages Backdoored via Official NPM Channel
items.summary_zh: 數十個Red Hat套件被發現透過其官方NPM管道植入後門程式，構成嚴重的供應鏈安全威脅。建議所有下載過受影響Red Hat套件的用戶立即進行調查，以防潛在的資料洩露或系統入侵。
items.summary_en: Dozens of Red Hat packages have been found to contain backdoors distributed through its official NPM channel, posing a severe supply chain security threat. Users who have downloaded affected Red Hat packages are advised to investigate immediately to prevent potential data breaches or system compromises.

items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩真主黨接受美國提議，同意停止與以色列相互攻擊
items.title_en: Lebanon's Hezbollah Accepts US Proposal to Halt Reciprocal Attacks with Israel
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩駐華盛頓大使館聲明指出，真主黨已接受美國提出的一項互相停止敵對行動的提議，範圍將擴大至涵蓋所有黎巴嫩領土。此舉有望緩解黎巴嫩與以色列邊境的緊張局勢。
items.summary_en: Lebanon's embassy in Washington announced that Hezbollah has accepted a U.S. proposal for a reciprocal halt to hostilities, extending to all Lebanese territory. This development aims to de-escalate tensions along the Lebanon-Israel border.
